problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Combining Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
